other_findings.finding: CD4+ T cells were localized to the periportal area in adult liver
T helper cells displayed enrichment of pathways related to cytokine-mediated signaling

evidence_quotes.quote: "CD4 was used as a known marker to identify T helper cells"
"IL7R, LEF1, and CCR7 were significantly upregulated in the CD4+ T cell cluster (adjusted P < 0.05)"
evidence_quotes.context: DE gene list for T cell clusters

evidence_quotes.quote: "CD4+ T cells were localized to the periportal area in adult liver as shown by spatial transcriptomics"
"T helper cells displayed enrichment of pathways related to cytokine-mediated signaling (see Supplementary Table S7)"
evidence_quotes.context: functional enrichment summary for T cell clusters
